descriptions.text: Cinnamoroll: Kurukuru Sweets Paradise is a Japanese Nintendo DS game released in 2007; developed and produced by Rocket Company.

Get sweets by flipping Cinnamon with the "Splash Flipper"! There are plenty of gimmicks that use the unique features of the DS, such as blowing on the microphone to stop Cinnamon from falling between the flippers, or touching the lower screen to shake the pinball board.

Of course, Cinnamon's friends are also involved. They come to help Cinnamon on the way, and there are also mini games for each character. As you progress through the game, you will be able to read stories and even fill in cute coloring pages of Cinnamon.
